name: Mai Tai
instructions:
Combine ingredients in shaker. 
Shake for 10 - 15 secs
Pour over crushed ice
Garnish with mint

name: Coconut Pineapple Rum Punch
desc: Here's a classic-style tiki drink that hits all three flavorsâ rum, pineapple, and coconut. It's a riff on a PiÃ±a Colada with more tiki depth
instructions:
1.  Add all ingredients to a shaker with crushed ice.
2.  Shake hard for 8â10 seconds.
3.  Dump everything (ice and all) into a tiki mug or hurricane glass.
4.  Top with more crushed ice if needed.
5.  Garnish with a pineapple wedge, mint sprig, and a cherry. A dusting of nutmeg on top is traditional.
If you want it lighter and more refreshing, skip the cream of coconut and use 1 oz coconut water instead, then serve over pebble ice.

name: Blue Hawaiian
desc: A vibrant tropical cocktail with a stunning electric blue color — sweet, creamy, and island-inspired
instructions:
1
Combine ingredients: Add 1.5 fluid ounces white rum, 1 fluid ounces blue curaçao, 2 fluid ounces pineapple juice, and 1 fluid ounces cream of coconut (e.g. Coco López) to a blender with 1 cups crushed ice.
2
Blend: Blend on high until smooth and slushy, about 20–25 seconds 
00:25
.
3
Serve & garnish: Pour into a chilled hurricane or Collins glass. Garnish with a pineapple slice and a maraschino cherry.
